languages.original_text: "The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

languages.text: "Воля Бога-Императора была ниспослана через Его помазанни{mf|ка|цу}, чтобы освободить верного слугу от вражеских оков. Все произошло так, как тому было должно случиться".
"The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."
languages.original_text: "Воля Бога-Императора была ниспослана через Его помазанни{mf|ка|цу}, чтобы освободить верного слугу от вражеских оков. Все произошло так, как тому было должно случиться".

"The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

languages.text: 「神皇帝の意志は、選ばれた者たちを通じて、忠実なしもべを敵の鎖から解放するために下された。すべては、本来のありのままに起こった」
languages.original_text: "The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝の意志は、選ばれた者たちを通じて、忠実なしもべを敵の鎖から解放するために下された。すべては、本来のありのままに起こった。」

languages.text: « À travers Ses élus, l'Empereur-Dieu a transmis sa volonté de libérer le fidèle serviteur des griffes de l'ennemi. Tout s'est déroulé comme Il l'avait prévu. »
languages.original_text: "The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

traits.locale_text: « À travers Ses élus, l'Empereur-Dieu a transmis sa volonté de libérer le fidèle serviteur des griffes de l'ennemi. Tout s'est déroulé comme Il l'avait prévu. »

languages.text: "Der Wille des Gottimperators wurde durch {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} gesandt, um die treuen Diener aus den Ketten des Feindes zu befreien. Alles hat sich gefügt, wie es sein sollte."
languages.original_text: "The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

traits.locale_text: "Der Wille des Gottimperators wurde durch {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} gesandt, um die treuen Diener aus den Ketten des Feindes zu befreien. Alles hat sich gefügt, wie es sein sollte."

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator'un iradesi, sadık hizmetkârı düşmanın prangalarından kurtarmak için O'nun seçilmiş kulu aracılığıyla gönderildi. Her şey olması gerektiği gibi oldu."
languages.original_text: "The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator'un iradesi, sadık hizmetkârı düşmanın prangalarından kurtarmak için O'nun seçilmiş kulu aracılığıyla gönderildi. Her şey olması gerektiği gibi oldu."

languages.text: «El Dios Emperador comunicó Su voluntad a través de Sus ungidos para que liberasen a los fieles de los grilletes del enemigo. Todo ocurrió según dictaba la providencia».
languages.original_text: "The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

traits.locale_text: «El Dios Emperador comunicó Su voluntad a través de Sus ungidos para que liberasen a los fieles de los grilletes del enemigo. Todo ocurrió según dictaba la providencia».

languages.text: “神皇的意志已通过祂的神选者降下，使忠仆得以挣脱敌人的枷锁。一切皆如神意所归。”
languages.original_text: "The will of the God-Emperor was sent down through His anointed to free the faithful servant from the enemy's shackles. Everything happened as it should have."

traits.locale_text: “神皇的意志已通过祂的神选者降下，使忠仆得以挣脱敌人的枷锁。一切皆如神意所归。”
